default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on priorities, unblock execution, and define the Check That launch strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=30.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Hiring is the top priority.** Jason must personally source candidates for the Managing Editor and Community roles to unblock the pipeline, as the current process is too slow.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Events need a reset.** The current approach is failing (e.g., 19 RSVPs for a breakfast). Jason will create playbooks to empower the team and restore momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
  - [**Check That launch strategy is now phased.** Phase 1 (Marcel-led) focuses on building an SEO engine and onboarding customers. Phase 2 is a public splash, targeting Nov 13.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
  - [**Jason will delegate more.** Marcel will own the Check That launch, allowing Jason to focus on hiring, events, and other initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=3562.0)

## Topics

### Hiring Bottleneck

  - [**Problem:** The hiring pipeline for critical roles (Managing Editor, Community) is stalled, blocking progress across multiple lanes.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Solution:** Jason must personally source candidates on LinkedIn.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This is the fastest way to build a high-quality pipeline and avoid the delays of a recruiter-led process.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
      - [**Guideline:** Dedicate 2 hours to sourcing and 5 hours to initial calls for each critical role.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:**](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [**Managing Editor:** Danny is the only strong candidate. Jason will fast-track the process, including a panel interview after the assignment is complete.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [**Compensation:** Discuss salary expectations (e.g., "what would get you really excited?") on the first call to ensure alignment and avoid wasting time.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [**Marketing Role:** Fast-track Drew, a highly motivated candidate with strong signals (e.g., Labelbox marketing success).](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)

### Events & Team Empowerment

  - [**Problem:** Event execution is failing, with low attendance and poor planning.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [**Example:** A recent breakfast had only 19 RSVPs.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [**Root Cause:** Gloria (Head of Events) is over-allocated to the Surge project (\~60% of time) and lacks the agency to drive events independently.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [**Solution:** Jason will create playbooks to empower the team and restore momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
      - [**Playbook Goal:** Enable the team to operate at Level 4/5 autonomy (propose solutions, then execute).](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=2260.0)
      - [**Immediate Action:** Cancel the Oct 29 webinar and begin promoting the Nov 13 event this week.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)

### Check That Launch Strategy

  - [**Problem:** The launch plan was misaligned, focusing on a flashy announcement before the product's core engine was ready.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
  - [**Solution:** A phased launch will de-risk the project by validating the product and building an audience before a public splash.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
  - [**Phase 1: Build the Engine (Marcel-Led)**](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
      - [**Goal:** Establish a self-sustaining organic growth machine.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=2800.0)
      - [**Actions:**](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=2800.0)
          - [**SEO:** Build strong technical SEO for thousands of public category pages.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=2800.0)
          - [**Customer Onboarding:** Onboard clients (e.g., Lovable) to track prompts, validating the private experience and collecting data.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=2905.0)
      - [**Timeline:** SEO work this week; customer onboarding next week.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=3297.0)
  - [**Phase 2: Public Splash**](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=3335.0)
      - [**Goal:** Drive awareness and traffic to the validated public site.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=2941.0)
      - [**Target Date:** November 13.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=3375.0)
      - [**Event Idea:** A "glorified breakfast" with a fireside chat, recorded for YouTube.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=3375.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jason:**](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [Personally source candidates for Managing Editor and Community roles.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [Create event playbooks to empower the team.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
      - [Cancel the Oct 29 webinar and begin promoting the Nov 13 event.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
      - [Get up to speed on the Check That project to support Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=3123.0)
  - [**Marcel:**](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=3562.0)
      - [Lead the Check That launch, focusing on SEO and customer onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=2793.0)
      - [Validate the Nov 13 launch date with the team.](https://fathom.video/share/RNmAwffd1o4j89rQvWx2sBT2SgyQss6T?tab=summary&timestamp=3375.0)

action_items.description: Email Marilia re: Danny comp expectations
Source candidates on LinkedIn for Managing Editor and Community roles
Check Drew meeting on calendar; fast-track Marketing lead
Define Community launch date and plan; then source Council and draft LinkedIn posts
Start promo for Nov 13 breakfast; book 30m w/ Marcel for invite list
Merge Events and Community weekly syncs
Draft webinar playbook doc (1k regs, 6-wk, Lumen); then schedule next webinar
Validate Nov 13 launch w/ team; if approved, buy AV and set up office
Own Check That launch; set up locally, review channel, share plan w/ Jason
